items.title: Spam and phishing detection
items.description: Binary logistic regression on text and metadata features outputs P(spam|email); fast baseline before transformer classifiers in high-volume mail pipelines.

items.title: Fraud and chargeback scoring
items.description: Transaction features feed sigmoid probabilities for P(fraud|x); risk teams rank alerts and set cost-sensitive thresholds on ŷ.

items.title: Healthcare risk stratification
items.description: EHR features predict P(condition|patient) for screening programs — probabilities support triage even when the 0.5 threshold is not clinically optimal.

items.title: Marketing conversion models
items.description: Predict P(purchase|click) or P(churn|account) for campaign targeting; BCE training optimizes probabilistic fit used in uplift and LTV models.

items.title: Neural network binary heads
items.description: Deep models often end with a linear layer + sigmoid + BCE — the same canonical pairing at scale; logistic regression is the one-layer special case.
